text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $63.8k while Ethereum trails slightly at $1,722, both showing minor daily declines in a market gripped by extreme fear (23 index). Bitcoin's dominance at 56.2% and $69B in daily volume suggest traders are rotating into the largest asset as risk appetite weakens, though the lack of panic selling indicates support is holding. Smaller altcoins like Solana are showing more pronounced weakness (-2.3%), a typical pattern when sentiment turns cautious and capital flows toward perceived safe havens.
